title: Chylismia munzii
taxonomy: Chylismia munzii is a species of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. It is native to the southwestern United States. Chylismia munzii is commonly known as Munz's evening primrose. The plant is a biennial herb with showy yellow flowers. Chylismia munzii is a relatively rare species that is often found in dry, rocky areas.
